full_text:
Geng Ji (Jixing) 耿紀 (季行)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Geng Ji (耿紀), styledJixing (季行), was born in Youfufeng. Launched a coup against Cao Cao. Wounded Wang Bi. Executed after his failure. Geng Ji was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Han Dynasty. Geng Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
